evals.expected_output: Routes explicit empty /slides-smith invocation to the Empty handler, shows the workflow menu, asks for a target, and does not start edits.
assertions: Does not create files before a workflow and target are selected.
Mentions Create, Edit, Design, Plugin, Export, Validate, Docs, Migrate, and Release options.

evals.expected_output: Routes explicit /slides-smith invocation to Create workflow, drafts a narrative arc, reads repo instructions before editing, uses @revealjs/react components, and plans relevant validation with pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint, pnpm validate:slides, and pnpm test:e2e when layout or navigation changes.
assertions: Does not create an apps/ directory.
Does not manually initialize Reveal in React.
Does not register the Reveal Markdown plugin by default.

evals.expected_output: Routes to Design and Edit workflows, resolves the active deck through src/slides/active-deck.tsx and src/slides/active-deck-metadata.ts, improves visual system layout hierarchy motion, preserves the established repo visual language, and runs relevant validation after visual changes.
assertions: Locates the target slide file before editing.
Uses Reveal props, data attributes, fragments, and React components instead of custom lifecycle wrappers.

evals.prompt: Make a technical talk deck about agents with code examples and export options
evals.expected_output: Activates slides-smith from a natural-language deck request and auto-detect create/edit/design/export/validate by selecting Create for the new deck, Design for layout needs, Export for export options, and Validate for completion checks.
assertions: States the selected workflow before editing.
Does not skip repo inspection before creating slides.

evals.prompt: Export this Reveal deck to PowerPoint and keep it easy to edit
evals.expected_output: Activates slides-smith from a natural-language trigger, classifies the request as Export, loads references/export-workflows.md, chooses and executes PowerPoint export strategy via Pandoc PPTX for editable text-first output, and warns that Pandoc PPTX will not preserve full React/CSS Reveal visual fidelity.
assertions: Does not ask an unnecessary editability-versus-fidelity question because the prompt already asks for editability.
Does not present PDF export as a PPTX solution.

evals.expected_output: Routes to Export workflow and asks one clarification question about editable content versus visual fidelity before choosing Pandoc PPTX, Screenshot PPTX, or Native PPTX.
assertions: Does not assume automatic React Reveal to editable PPTX conversion.
Explains the export intent gate before selecting tooling.

evals.expected_output: Routes to Export workflow, uses Reveal PDF, builds the deck, starts pnpm preview as a long-running server, runs pnpm export:pdf while preview is still running, and does not treat PDF as PPTX.
assertions: Mentions the preview server must remain running during Decktape export.
Keeps Reveal ?print-pdf as a manual fallback, not the default automated path.

evals.expected_output: Routes to Export workflow, selects Legacy PPT only because .ppt was explicitly requested, generates the selected PPTX first, then uses LibreOffice conversion with soffice --headless --convert-to ppt, and warns about fidelity loss.
assertions: Does not convert directly from React Reveal to legacy .ppt.
Uses the same selected deck slug for PPTX generation and PPT conversion.

evals.prompt: /slides-smith plugin add Mermaid diagrams to one deck
evals.expected_output: Routes to Plugin workflow, review or implement Reveal plugin changes, prefers the existing opt-in Mermaid preset, updates plugin metadata README docs only if surfaces change, and plans pnpm validate:plugin-presets plus pnpm validate:slides or pnpm build before pnpm validate:bundle.
assertions: Does not add Mermaid to default revealPlugins without explicit user approval.
Mentions tests/plugin-presets-entry.ts and scripts/validate-default-bundle.mjs if a new opt-in preset or marker is added.

evals.expected_output: Routes to Plugin workflow, recognizes a default plugin policy change, asks for or verifies explicit approval, then syncs src/lib/reveal-plugins.ts, src/lib/reveal-plugin-metadata.ts, README, docs/content/docs/reveal-plugins.mdx, preset validation, slide validation, docs build, and E2E where runtime behavior can change.
assertions: Does not silently expand the default plugin array.
Keeps the default plugin set intentionally small unless approval is explicit.

evals.expected_output: Routes to Docs workflow, syncs README and docs for slide workflow changes, checks plugin policy surfaces, and runs pnpm docs:build after documentation changes.
assertions: Does not change runtime plugin code for docs-only updates.
Keeps docs source-grounded in the repo plugin metadata.

evals.prompt: /slides-smith polish the legacy deck and document the migration
evals.expected_output: Routes to Migrate, Design, and Docs workflows only after locating or asking for the legacy deck path; then port legacy reveal.js/html decks into repo-native React slides, improve visual system layout hierarchy motion where appropriate, and document migration boundaries.
assertions: Keeps legacy archive content out of active build paths unless porting intentionally.
Does not edit an arbitrary legacy deck without a target path.

evals.expected_output: Routes to Validate workflow, loads references/validation.md, runs repo validation and browser smoke checks, reports that pnpm test:e2e is a dev-server smoke test, and states which commands passed or could not run.
assertions: Does not claim Playwright exercises production preview unless a preview-specific check was run.
Does not claim axe scans every slide state unless the test was extended to do so.

evals.expected_output: Routes to Release workflow, loads validation guidance, runs full ship-readiness validation, and reports pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint, pnpm validate:plugin-presets, pnpm build, pnpm docs:build, pnpm validate:slides, pnpm test:e2e, and pnpm audit --audit-level moderate or explains any command that could not run.
assertions: Does not include empty-invocation menu behavior in the release workflow.
Reports residual risks for export artifacts or production preview if not inspected.

evals.prompt: Create a Slidev theme package for my Vue slides
evals.expected_output: Negative control: should not trigger slides-smith, does not trigger this skill, routes to Slidev or general frontend handling if available, and does not apply Vite React Reveal repo rules.
assertions: Recognizes this is not for this Vite React Reveal repo workflow.
Does not use slides-smith validation or plugin policy for Slidev/Marp work.
